description_long: This is a stylized revolver-type handgun with a predominantly black and white color scheme, featuring bold, graphic elements. The barrel is long and rectangular with two white diagonal stripes on each side, and the cylinder area is highlighted in white, contrasting with the rest of the body. The grip is ergonomically shaped, black in color, and adorned with a white spade symbol and a heart with an arrow, giving it a unique, custom appearance. The trigger guard is rounded and robust, seamlessly integrated into the frame. The muzzle and rear sight are both finished in white, matching the top of the barrel and the cylinder. The overall design is sleek and modern, with a focus on visual impact and thematic embellishments.
description: A stylized black and white revolver with bold graphic symbols and a long, rectangular barrel. The grip features unique spade and heart motifs, giving it a custom, eye-catching look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the left profile, with two white stripes on the barrel and a spade symbol on the frame, plus a heart motif on the grip.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the circular muzzle and the symmetry of the barrel and frame.
description_view_2: Side view showing the right profile, with the same white stripes and spade symbol, but the heart motif is more visible on the grip.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the grip and the rear sight, with the barrel's rectangular shape clearly visible.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is black with a smooth, contoured ergonomic shape, featuring a white spade symbol and a heart with an arrow motif. It appears to be made of polymer or a similar material, with a slightly matte finish and no visible texturing or finger grooves. The base of the grip is rounded and capped with a white accent, adding to its visual distinction.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, seamlessly integrated into the frame with a smooth, continuous curve. It lacks any undercuts or squared-off edges and does not display additional texturing or reinforcement, maintaining a clean and simple design.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is long, rectangular, and non-tapered, with a smooth exterior and two bold white diagonal stripes on each side. It does not appear to have threading, porting, or compensator features, and the finish is consistent with the rest of the handgun's stylized look.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide and frame feature prominent white graphic markings: two diagonal stripes on the barrel, a large spade symbol on the frame, and a heart with an arrow on the grip. There are no visible manufacturer logos, serial numbers, or caliber designations.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is not distinctly visible, but the grip terminates in a rounded, slightly flared white cap, which may serve as the floorplate. It is smooth, with no finger rest, texturing, or logos other than the decorative motifs.
